summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Finance Dashboard feature. All 12 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend UI testing verified all components working correctly: /finances page loads, PC selector dropdown, summary cards (Guthaben, Einnahmen, Ausgaben, Mietkosten), 3 tabs (Übersicht, Transaktionslog, Tagesansicht), and sidebar navigation with Coins icon.

issues: ESLint warnings for missing dependencies in useEffect hooks (lines 54, 72) - not blocking but should be addressed

passed_tests: /finances page loads and shows PC selector dropdown
Finance summary cards show: Guthaben, Einnahmen, Ausgaben, Mietkosten
Übersicht tab shows: Wiederkehrende Einnahmen, Wiederkehrende Ausgaben, Schulden, Besitz
Transaktionslog tab shows table with columns: Tag, Typ, Beschreibung, Quelle, Betrag
Tagesansicht tab groups transactions by day with daily totals
PC selector switches between characters and reloads data
GET /api/sandbox/inventar/{pc_id} returns categorized data with finances
GET /api/transactions returns transactions with day and source fields
POST /api/sandbox/tagwechsel creates transactions with day and source=tagwechsel
POST /api/transactions (gameplay) adds day and source=gameplay automatically
Sidebar shows 'Finanzen' nav item with Coins icon
critical_code_review_comments: Minor: ESLint warnings in FinanceDashboard.jsx for useEffect dependencies - consider adding eslint-disable comments or fixing dependencies
seed_data_creation: Used existing test PCs from iteration_9: Heinrich der Schmied (158e58e5-a7c8-40cf-acd3-3b31b0a2b2e4), Dr. Elara Voss (182869c5-04a8-4395-a8de-ecde1aa53128)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Finance Dashboard feature fully implemented and tested. Campaign ID: 2b18dad2-4484-4ab6-bb65-0667f35fff19 (current_day: 13). Test PCs: Heinrich der Schmied, Dr. Elara Voss, Hans der Bauer. All finance APIs working: /api/sandbox/inventar, /api/transactions, /api/properties, /api/finances, /api/sandbox/tagwechsel. Frontend at /finances with 3 tabs and PC selector.

components_verified: PC selector dropdown with all active characters
Summary cards: Guthaben, Einnahmen (letzte), Ausgaben (letzte), Mietkosten
Übersicht tab: Wiederkehrende Einnahmen, Wiederkehrende Ausgaben, Schulden & Verpflichtungen, Besitz & Mietobjekte
Transaktionslog tab: Table with Tag, Typ, Beschreibung, Quelle, Betrag columns
Tagesansicht tab: Transactions grouped by day with daily totals

backend_apis.GET /api/sandbox/inventar/{pc_id}: Returns categorized inventory with finances and properties
backend_apis.GET /api/transactions: Returns transactions with day and source fields
backend_apis.POST /api/transactions: Adds day (from campaign.current_day) and source=gameplay automatically
backend_apis.POST /api/sandbox/tagwechsel: Creates transactions with day and source=tagwechsel
